evidence: squeeze_long produced 10 VALID_0DTE trades, $721 PnL, no slow >=12h trades, worst MAE -208.25, median MFE 77.78, but only 187.16 PnL/exposure hour and 23.1 minute average hold. The latest report has no upside TP extension candidates, so faster realization is more defensible than further target expansion.
name: Squeeze Fast Realization Classifier
risk: Lowering targets may cut profitable continuation tails and reduce total net profit even if exposure hours improve.
trigger: VALID_0DTE squeeze_long entries with confirmed option context and ES VWAP slope strong enough for continuation.
validation_metric: squeeze_long PnL/exposure hour improves, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, completed trades remain within 10%, worst MAE stays no worse than -225 for squeeze_long, and slow_12h_trades remains 0.

evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long remains profitable at $1217.3 over 33 trades but owns the global -527 MAE. Static config filters overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, so the clean separator is early path failure rather than another broad threshold.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries and block clean high-extension winners unless protected-winner retention is validated.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entry that fails to make early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total PnL >=98% of leader, and slow trades remain 0.
